TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: O 'adiyoc hanany i, o masataliyokay a fali, satakaraw sa, tefod saan a tomireng i tarawadaw. Ano tata'ak ko cidal a faedet ko romi'ad i, makowad no faedet ko fali a masa'adiyoc. Manengneng i tarawadaw ano ma'adiyoc ko tahefod. Ano ta'angay ko fali no 'adiyoc i, mapaefer ko maamaan a tahira i kafaed, o katalawan to. O kakahad no 'adiyoc i, o mimingay i, cecay a kong-ce , ta'angayay i, manga'ay tahira i moetep a kong-ce ko kakahad.
S.PHON: o~u ʡaɬ~ɮijo~uʦ ħananj i, o~u masataɾijo~ukaj a faɾi, satakaraw sa, təfo~uɬ~ɮ saan a to~umirəŋ i tarawaɬ~ɮaw. ano~u tataʡak ko~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ a faəɬ~ɮət ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i, mako~uwaɬ~ɮ no~u faəɬ~ɮət ko~u faɾi a masaʡaɬ~ɮijo~uʦ. manəŋnəŋ i tarawaɬ~ɮaw ano~u maʡaɬ~ɮijo~uʦ ko~u taħəfo~uɬ~ɮ. ano~u taʡaŋaj ko~u faɾi no~u ʡaɬ~ɮijo~uʦ i, mapaəfər ko~u maamaan a taħira i kafaəɬ~ɮ, o~u kataɾawan to~u. o~u kakaħaɬ~ɮ no~u ʡaɬ~ɮijo~uʦ i, o~u mimiŋaj i, ʦəʦaj a ko~uŋ-ʦə , taʡaŋajaj i, maŋaʡaj taħira i mo~uətəp a ko~uŋ-ʦə ko~u kakaħaɬ~ɮ.
S.FORM: O 'adiyoc hanany i, o masataliyokay a fali, satakaraw sa, tefod saan a tomireng i tarawadaw. Ano tata'ak ko cidal a faedet ko romi'ad i, makowad no faedet ko fali a masa'adiyoc. Manengneng i tarawadaw ano ma'adiyoc ko tahefod. Ano ta'angay ko fali no 'adiyoc i, mapaefer ko maamaan a tahira i kafaed, o katalawan to. O kakahad no 'adiyoc i, o mimingay i, cecay a kong-ce , ta'angayay i, manga'ay tahira i moetep a kong-ce ko kakahad.
S.PHON: o~u ʡaɬ~ɮijo~uʦ ħananj i, o~u masataɾijo~ukaj a faɾi, satakaraw sa, təfo~uɬ~ɮ saan a to~umirəŋ i tarawaɬ~ɮaw. ano~u tataʡak ko~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ a faəɬ~ɮət ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i, mako~uwaɬ~ɮ no~u faəɬ~ɮət ko~u faɾi a masaʡaɬ~ɮijo~uʦ. manəŋnəŋ i tarawaɬ~ɮaw ano~u maʡaɬ~ɮijo~uʦ ko~u taħəfo~uɬ~ɮ. ano~u taʡaŋaj ko~u faɾi no~u ʡaɬ~ɮijo~uʦ i, mapaəfər ko~u maamaan a taħira i kafaəɬ~ɮ, o~u kataɾawan to~u. o~u kakaħaɬ~ɮ no~u ʡaɬ~ɮijo~uʦ i, o~u mimiŋaj i, ʦəʦaj a ko~uŋ-ʦə , taʡaŋajaj i, maŋaʡaj taħira i mo~uətəp a ko~uŋ-ʦə ko~u kakaħaɬ~ɮ.
